data.title: How Bitcoin ETFs Are Eating The Lunch Of Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin
data.description: According to Adrian Fritz, an Investment Strategist at 21Shares, there is a growing trend of traditional investors steadily accumulating spot crypto ETFs. In an interview on Apr.27, Fritz mentioned that spot Bitcoin ETFs have seen inflows of approximately $1.1 billion year to date, despite geopolitical tensions. This increase in participation includes major asset managers like Morgan Stanley and U.S. hedge funds, indicating a gradual adoption rather than a sudden spike in demand. Fritz explained that due to ETF structures, it is challenging to differentiate between new and existing investors, but overall, there is a noticeable increase in comfort with Bitcoin as an institutional asset. The scale and liquidity of Bitcoin are contributing factors to this trend.
Refresco finalizes deal to acquire SunOpta, a provider of supply chain solutions in North America.

data.title: UTime Limited Announces Pricing of $1.2 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: UTime Limited, a tech company based in Shenzhen, China, revealed today the signing of a definitive securities purchase agreement with select institutional investors. The agreement involves the sale of 1,000,000 class A ordinary shares of the Company, each valued at $0.50 per share, or pre-funded warrants, at a price of $1.20 per share. This transaction, part of a registered direct offering, marks a significant development in the Company's operations.

data.title: The Wires Announces Launch of “The Wires 100,” Culminating in Exclusive New York Awards Gala
data.description: Seattle-based company The Wires, which owns FashWire, GlossWire, and PawWire, revealed The Wires 100 initiative honoring top brands in fashion, beauty, and pet industries. This annual recognition will showcase 100 outstanding brands for their design, product innovation, sustainability, and cultural significance. The culminating event, The Wires 100 Gala and Awards Ceremony, is set for December.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP Investigates Claims of Securities Fraud against The Clorox Company
data.description: A law firm based in Milwaukee, Ademi LLP, is currently looking into potential securities fraud allegations against Clorox (NYSE: CLX). The inquiry stems from concerns about Clorox possibly providing misleading information related to its financial reports, business activities, and future outlook. Interested parties can find more information regarding this investigation by...
Monday FX Options Expiries
Shell International Finance B.V. has released its 2025 annual financial statements.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP Investigates Claims of Securities Fraud against Roblox Corporation
data.description: Ademi LLP is currently looking into potential securities fraud allegations against Roblox (NYSE: RBLX) as a result of potentially misleading statements made by the company about its financial statements, business operations, and future outlook. The investigation, initiated on May 1, 2026, seeks to determine the accuracy of information provided by Roblox to investors. If you have further information pertaining to this matter, please refer to the official press release or contact Ademi LLP for more details.

data.title: SunOpta Completes Arrangement With Refresco
data.description: SunOpta Inc., a North American supply chain solutions provider, headquartered in Minneapolis, has been acquired by an affiliate of Refresco Holding B.V. for US$6.50 per Common Share in cash. The acquisition, completed successfully, was part of a plan of arrangement under section 192 of the Canada Business Corporations Act. SunOpta is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol STKL and on the Toronto Stock Exchange under SOY.

data.title: Badger Meter Completes Acquisition of UDlive
data.description: Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) has finalized the acquisition of UDlive, a UK company specializing in hardware-based software solutions for sewer line monitoring. This move integrates UDlive into the BlueEdge® water management solutions with SmartCover®. The merger combines SmartCover's strong U.S. presence with UDlive's leading position in the UK, solidifying a prominent global market presence for Badger Meter. The acquisition strengthens Badger Meter's portfolio and enhances its offerings in sewer line monitoring.

data.title: Permag™ Recognized by Northrop Grumman for Strengthening Defense Industrial Base Through Innovation and Collaboration
data.description: ELK GROVE VILLAGE, Ill., May 1, 2026 - Permag™ has received recognition from Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) as one of the top suppliers at the annual Supplier Excellence Awards. The event, held recently, showcased outstanding partners, with Permag™ being honored for their exceptional performance in the industry. This acknowledgment emphasizes the company's commitment to excellence and innovation in their contributions to Northrop Grumman Corporation.

data.title: Carrier Global Analysts Boost Their Forecasts Following Upbeat Q1 Earnings
data.description: Carrier Global Corp, listed on NYSE as CARR, released their Q1 financial results surpassing expectations. Their quarterly earnings stood at 57 cents per share, higher than the predicted 51 cents per share. Additionally, their quarterly sales were reported at $5.341 billion, exceeding the anticipated $5.008 billion. CEO David Gitlin expressed satisfaction with the sales performance, noting a 35% increase in orders for the global Commercial HVAC business, particularly driven by a significant uptick in data centers which surged over 500% in the period. The robust double-digit rise in Commercial HVAC backlog indicates a positive outlook for achieving the sixth consecutive year of double-digit growth in the business.

data.title: Ethereum's price may reach $2,450 in 14 days, trading at $2,276. 60.6% holding long positions foreseeing an upwards trend.
data.description: The price of Ethereum has reached $2,276, with 60.6% of smart money investors holding long positions. Technical indicators suggest a potential breakout towards $2,450. The current market conditions indicate low downside risk and significant upside potential for Ethereum.

data.title: Royal Visit to Front Royal: Randolph-Macon Academy Shines at Block Party for King Charles III and Queen Camilla
data.description: Front Royal, Virginia - On May 1, 2026, Randolph-Macon Academy (R-MA) hosted a unique event showcasing music, leadership, tradition, and transatlantic friendship. This celebration highlighted the future American leaders. R-MA is recognized as Virginia's leading college-preparatory boarding and day school. This event was a significant gathering, emphasizing the importance of cultivating the next generation of leaders.

data.title: TEMCO TEAMSTERS RALLY FOR FAIR CONTRACT AT HOME DEPOT HEADQUARTERS
data.description: In a recent development, a group of Home Depot workers known as Temco Teamsters, along with their supporters, gathered outside the company's headquarters in Atlanta. This event occurred three months after they successfully unionized, being the first drivers from Home Depot to do so. During the rally, they called for a fair initial contract and an end to union busting practices. The demonstration aimed to highlight their demands and gain visibility for their cause.

data.title: Alpine Banks of Colorado announces financial results for first quarter 2026
data.description: Alpine Banks of Colorado, headquartered in Glenwood Springs, shared unaudited financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. Operating as the holding company for Alpine Bank, the company traded under the ticker symbol ALPIB on OTCQX. The specific numbers were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: Apotex becomes the first Canadian‑based pharmaceutical company to receive Health Canada approval for a generic equivalent of Ozempic®
data.description: In Toronto on May 1, 2026, Apotex Inc. revealed that Health Canada has granted approval for Apo-Semaglutide Injection, a generic version of Ozempic (semaglutide injection). Apotex, recognized as Canada's biggest Canadian-based global health enterprise, made the announcement. The recently approved generic pharmaceutical will offer an alternative to the branded medication. This marks a significant development in the pharmaceutical industry as it introduces competition to the market.

data.title: Sphere Entertainment Co. to Host First Quarter 2026 Conference Call
data.description: Sphere Entertainment Co. (NYSE: SPHR) will conduct a conference call on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. Prior to the market opening, the Company will release a press statement detailing its performance. For those interested in participating via phone, dial 888-800-3155 using the conference ID number 8089430 at least 10 minutes before the call begins. Additionally, the call can be accessed through a webcast at investor.sphereent.

data.title: Bitcoin's price target is set at $85,000 with a breakout pattern forming above $77,000. Resistance at $78,466 expected.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has remained stable above $77,000 and is showing signs of a breakout pattern forming that could drive it to reach $85,000 in the coming weeks. The pattern is shaping up nicely, with momentum gaining strength. The key resistance level to overcome is at $78,466. This potential surge in value represents a significant increase in the cryptocurrency's price.
